Container.Name: wakeword-training
Container.Overview: Train custom wake word models for openwakeword using synthetic speech generation and GPU-accelerated training. Produces .onnx and .tflite models for use with Home Assistant voice pipelines. REQUIRES an NVIDIA GPU — install the Nvidia-Driver plugin and ensure --runtime=nvidia is set in Extra Parameters. Configure wake words and manage training via the built-in web UI.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the training web UI

Config.Name: NVIDIA Visible Devices
Config.Description: Which GPU(s) to use. 'all' for all GPUs, or a specific GPU UUID from the Nvidia-Driver plugin.

Config.Name: Data Cache
Config.Description: Cached datasets and intermediate training data (~12GB first run)

Config.Name: Model Output
Config.Description: Where the trained .onnx and .tflite models are written
